bge_query_format.prefix: Represent this sentence for searching relevant passages:
bge_query_format.rationale: BAAI/bge-large-en-v1.5 recommends an instruction prefix for retrieval queries. Because this pipeline performs question-to-question retrieval, the same prefix is applied to indexed Spider-Train questions and Dev queries to avoid a query/document embedding distribution mismatch.

sample_removed_duplicate_examples.question: Find the name of the courses that do not have any prerequisite?
sample_removed_duplicate_examples.sql: SELECT title FROM course WHERE course_id NOT IN (SELECT course_id FROM prereq);

sample_removed_duplicate_examples.question: Find the names of users who did not leave any review.
sample_removed_duplicate_examples.sql: SELECT name FROM useracct WHERE u_id NOT IN (SELECT u_id FROM review);

sample_removed_duplicate_examples.question: What is the id and last name of the driver who participated in the most races after 2010?
sample_removed_duplicate_examples.sql: SELECT T1.driverid ,  T1.surname FROM drivers AS T1 JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid  =  T2.driverid JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid WHERE T3.year > 2010 GROUP BY T1.driverid ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

sample_removed_duplicate_examples.question: Find the count of universities whose campus fee is greater than the average campus fee.
sample_removed_duplicate_examples.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM csu_fees WHERE campusfee  >  (SELECT avg(campusfee) FROM csu_fees);

sample_removed_duplicate_examples.question: How many movies were made before 2000?
sample_removed_duplicate_examples.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM Movie WHERE YEAR  <  2000;

sample_removed_duplicate_examples.question: How many regions do we have?
display all the information about the department Marketing.

sample_removed_overlap_examples.question: How many flights do we have?
How many players are from each country?
sample_removed_overlap_examples.sql: SELECT Country_name ,  COUNT(*) FROM country AS T1 JOIN match_season AS T2 ON T1.Country_id  =  T2.Country GROUP BY T1.Country_name;

sample_removed_overlap_examples.question: How many courses are there in total?
Find the total number of courses offered.
What is the total number of airlines?

near_duplicate_train_question_samples.question_b: Give the years and official names of the cities of each competition.

near_duplicate_train_question_samples.question_a: Show the official names of the cities that have hosted more than one competition.
near_duplicate_train_question_samples.question_b: What are the official names of cities that have hosted more than one competition?

near_duplicate_train_question_samples.sql_b: SELECT T1.Official_Name FROM city AS T1 JOIN farm_competition AS T2 ON T1.City_ID  =  T2.Host_city_ID GROUP BY T2.Host_city_ID HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1;
